_comment: Whole-transition descriptor (#40): guarded_abort.so credits the u64 `counter` at offset 8 by the runtime `amount` read at offset 0, guarded by amount != 0 (the guard-fail path PANICS via the abort syscall (typed .abort fault)). The tracked account is the counter field; `amount` is an instruction argument, so it stays a setup cell (naming the add_param lets the bundle call its binder `amount`). No IDL, so the shape is inline. Schema: docs/REFINEMENT_DESCRIPTOR.md.
